name: web-motion
description: Self-contained web motion skills with official GreenSock GSAP skills, MIT TypeGPU guidance, and bundled docs for Motion React, CSS, WAAPI, Tailwind, Lottie, Three.js/R3F, and Rive.

interface.shortDescription: Build high-quality motion for web apps.
interface.longDescription: Self-contained web motion plugin for production apps: official GreenSock GSAP skills, Software Mansion TypeGPU guidance, Motion React, CSS animations, WAAPI, Tailwind v4 motion utilities, Lottie/dotLottie assets, Three.js/R3F scenes, and exact-trigger Rive workflows. Includes bundled source docs and atomic-reference validation scripts.
defaultPrompt: Add polished Motion React transitions to this UI.
Build a GSAP ScrollTrigger sequence for this page.
Create a performant Three.js/R3F scene for this app.
